summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Property Management Portal after Django REST Framework conversion. Backend APIs are 93.8% functional with minor URL configuration issues resolved. Frontend authentication and navigation work correctly, but API integration has 404 errors due to trailing slash URL mismatches.

configuration_issues.issue: Django APPEND_SLASH setting caused 500 errors for POST requests
API endpoints expect trailing slashes for viewsets but not for auth endpoints
configuration_issues.solution: Updated backend test to handle both URL patterns correctly

minor_issues.issue: Returns 204 No Content instead of expected 200 OK
minor_issues.impact: Test expectation mismatch - 204 is actually correct for DELETE

integration_issues.issue: Multiple 404 errors for API endpoints - frontend calling URLs without trailing slashes
integration_issues.error_details: Failed to fetch dashboard data, notifications, properties, tenants, landlords

design_issues.issue: Red error banners showing 'Failed to fetch' messages on all pages

passed_tests: User authentication (login) for property manager role
Dashboard loading with proper role-based layout
Navigation between all pages (Dashboard, Properties, Tenants, Landlords, Leases, Rent Tracking, Complaints)
Professional UI design and branding maintained
Backend API endpoints (15/16 tests passed - 93.8% success rate)
Empty state displays for all entity pages
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend API integration by ensuring all API calls use trailing slashes for viewset endpoints (properties/, users/, leases/, rents/, complaints/, notifications/) while keeping auth endpoints without trailing slashes (auth/login, auth/register, auth/me, dashboard/stats). Update frontend API service to handle Django REST Framework URL patterns correctly.
